title: Plan, monitor and evaluate strategies to improve livestock through genetics
training_package_name: Agriculture, Horticulture and Conservation and Land Management Training Package
competent_person_statement: A competent person in Plan, monitor and evaluate strategies to improve livestock through genetics demonstrates consistent performance across all elements and performance criteria in a workplace context.

elements.title: Plan breeding goals

pcs.text: Select product specification suited to breeding enterprise
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Select product specification suited to breeding enterprise?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Select product specification suited to breeding enterprise.

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Determine the breeding goals and strategy to meet market specifications.

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Analyse traits affecting profit in a livestock breeding enterprise to optimise production through an improved breeding program.
